film.title: Mr Joe B. Carvalho
film.overview: A small time detective is hired to bring back the daughter of a businessman who has run away from home with the house chef.

dialogues.dialogue: And you didn't have your swimming trunks. You went into the water without them. Shameless. How old were you? I was six, and you were three. Right? - Yes.
Gehna, my love. - Excuse me. Here I am. - Where's the way to get down? Shameless. Fighting with women. Look. I don't fight with women... I mean it.
You know...People should stad whistling when she enters. Hey gorgeous! She walks with pride. And everyone's eager to hold her hand. Mama, everyone falls flat at her sight.
I am sure. Wearing your papa's clothes......you will be a great detective like him. I'll make you proud, papa. I'll be a great detective. Just like you.
dialogues.cause_raw: child's aspiration to be like him
